name: Soccer Duel
description: Experience a real football match in a dynamic tabletop arcade game! Soccer Duel features fast-paced and intense 1v1 matches where reaction, strategy, and accurate shooting are crucial. Play as you want: • Single-player mode against AI • Two players on the same device • Real-time online matches • Tournament mode • Penalty shootout 32 national teams. Choose your country and lead it to victory! Simple controls, deep strategy. Easy to start, hard to master. Quick matches. Perfect for short gaming sessions.
instructions: Use the mouse on your computer or tap your finger on your mobile device to control the characters on the field
